data.title: Monolithic Framework
data.description: Apple.com employs a unified codebase that handles various services under one umbrella to ensure seamless integration and debuggability.
data.technical_spec: An all-in-one architecture combining e-commerce, support, and marketing pages without microservices.

data.title: Managed Hosting
data.description: Utilizes high-performance web servers optimized for Apple’s needs, ensuring high availability and load balancing.
data.technical_spec: Hosted on Apple-managed infrastructure with custom configurations for optimal server performance.

data.title: Single Page Application Elements
data.description: Certain sections on the site employ SPA techniques to provide a seamless user experience.
data.technical_spec: JavaScript frameworks enable dynamic page updates without full reloads.

data.title: API Integration
data.description: Various APIs are utilized for data fetching and service integrations, offering connective flexibility.
data.technical_spec: RESTful and GraphQL APIs facilitate backend communication.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The site is built to adapt across devices, optimizing the layout and performance for different screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries and fluid grid structures ensure responsiveness.
